---
title: "Meeting Minutes"
date: "March 2, 2026"
date-modified: last-modified
---

# Project Log & Minutes

This page serves as a comprehensive record of our team's progress, decisions, and action items throughout the semester.

---

## Meeting 1
* **Date:** March 2, 2026 
* **Time:** 10:15 AM - 10:30 AM
* **Location:** Virtual
* **Attendees:** Yi Ning and Saanvi

### Agenda
1. Project kickoff

### Discussion Points
1. Brainstorm ideas while we wait for project topic to be released
2. Get started with quarto and netlify

### Action Items
| Task | Assigned To | Status |
|------|------------|--------|
| Set up website | Yi Ning | Completed |


## Meeting 2
---
